notes: With usual Steam Proton, the game will boot but with everything completely out of sync and the game stuck in the top left corner. Emulation works OKish but still is off center. The intro movie will force a crash if it plays and it's glitched. Proton GE plays the movie, but skipping or having it go on for a few secs wil make it crash.
title: 暴れん坊天狗 & ZOMBIE NATION
